attributes.name: Riya Kafle
attributes.description: Portrait of the same woman as in Riya Kafle 2.jpg — long dark hair, floral print sleeveless top with black trim — but in a different pose, looking slightly upward and to the side with a warm smile. Background is a plain light yellow/cream wall.
attributes.attire: floral print sleeveless top with black trim, gold bracelet, necklace
attributes.expression: smiling, looking upward and to side
